title: Journal of Happiness and Well-Being (JHWB)

Journal of Happiness and Well-Being (JHWB)

Journal of Happiness and Well-Being (JHWB) is an open access, double-blind, peer-reviewed, international scientific journal published twice a year in print and online, in March and September, in Turkish and English.

The aim of the journal is to promote applied and pragmatic critical analysis of issues related to happiness and psychological well-being. The journal also aims to contribute to academic interaction by bringing original studies produced by local and foreign expert academicians and researchers from different disciplines to the relevant circles.

JHWB is a journal that publishes qualitative and quantitative research in the field of positive psychology. The scope of the journal includes many topics such as the pursuit of happiness, benefits of happiness, happiness and well-being, determinants of happiness, psychological resilience, forgiveness, psychology of emotions, emotional intelligence, empathy and altruism, love, sexual well-being, marriage and romantic relationships, mindfulness, meaning and purpose of life, human strengths.
